# The xlsx uses empty cells (openpyxl reads as None) for missing

column8: Additive index of Disappearances + Extrajudicial Killings + Political Imprisonment + Torture; range 0-8; higher = greater respect for physical integrity rights. Cross-validates UCDP one-sided fatalities and V-Dem v2clkill for the domestic_violence category.

Additive index of Disappearances + Extrajudicial Killings + Political Imprisonment + Torture + Fair Trial + Assembly + Speech + Religious Freedom; range 0-17; higher = less repression. Cross-validates CIRIGHTS physint and V-Dem v2csreprss.
Additive index of Freedom of Assembly and Association + Freedom of Speech + Religious Freedom; range 0-6; higher = greater civil and political rights. Cross-validates V-Dem v2x_civlib and v2x_freexp.
